message:
feat(test): add multi-connector E2E test and fix scan root detection for Cline/Amp

- Add tests/e2e_multi_connector.rs covering Codex, Claude, Gemini, Cline, Amp.
- Fix ClineConnector and AmpConnector to verify root directory identity before scanning (avoiding false positives on DB dir).
- Fix Gemini fixture in tests to match expected format.
- Address incremental indexing timing race in E2E test.
